philosophy-on-skills.title: Philosophy on Skills
philosophy-on-skills.description: Team stance on when a Skill is the right answer — and when it isn't. When to create, modify, or delete a Skill.

philosophy-on-mcp.title: Philosophy on MCP
philosophy-on-mcp.description: Team stance on when an MCP server is the right answer — and when it isn't. When to create, modify, or delete an MCP server.

open-transcripts.title: OpenTranscripts
open-transcripts.description: Vendor-neutral data model for coding-agent transcripts. The Transcript wrapper, the event catalog, and the Transcript Segment analysis layer.

open-transcripts-transcript.title: OpenTranscripts — Transcript wrapper
open-transcripts-transcript.description: Top-level Transcript shape: schema_version, transcript_id, parent linkage, agent/cwd/timestamps, events, subagents, final_metrics, provider. Cited field-by-field.

open-transcripts-events.title: OpenTranscripts — Event catalog
open-transcripts-events.description: The nine event types (UserMessage, AssistantMessage, Thinking, ToolCall, ToolResult, SubagentSpawn, Compaction, Error, SystemEvent) plus supporting types. Cited field-by-field.

transcript-segment.title: Transcript Segment
transcript-segment.description: The analysis primitive of the agent-transcript-analysis plugin. Trigger → Goal → Outcome tree built over a Transcript.

open-transcripts-claude-code-mapping.title: OpenTranscripts — Claude Code mapping
open-transcripts-claude-code-mapping.description: Field-by-field mapping from Claude Code's JSONL files into a Transcript. Source of truth for the CC→OT transformation skills.
